name: Mutual Fund Advisor Eval Set
purpose: Tests an MF-focused advisor across categorisation, tax, behaviour-coaching, switch advice, and regulatory disclosure.

rubric.factual_correctness: Categories, tax rules, lock-ins, exit loads quoted correctly
rubric.no_specific_recommendation: Agent must NOT name a specific scheme as 'best buy' — describe categories and trade-offs
rubric.behavioural_coaching: When user is panicking, agent should acknowledge emotion before facts
rubric.regulatory_disclosure: Past-performance disclaimer + 'subject to market risks' language

cases.user: Index fund vs flexicap fund — long term ke liye kaunsa accha?
must_include: index fund: low TER, market-cap weighted, no manager risk
flexicap: active manager, can rotate across cap sizes

cases.user: Market 8% gir gaya kal. Mai apna SIP rok du?
must_include: SIPs are designed for falls — that's when you accumulate cheaper units
stopping = locking in loss without recovery participation

cases.user: Quant Smallcap me 4 saal SIP kiya. 38% return hai. Switch karu Nifty 50 index me?
must_include: risk profile of smallcap vs largecap
tax implication of full-redemption: STCG/LTCG calc
alternative: STP from smallcap to index over 6-12 months to manage tax + market timing risk

cases.user: Equity MF, 11 months hold, ₹2L gain. Tax kitna?
must_include: (post Jul-2024 Finance Act change from 15% to 20%)
advice on holding past 12 months for LTCG tax efficiency, but only if fits goal

cases.user: 10 saal Regular plan me SIP chala. Direct me switch karu? Kitna fayda hua hota?
must_include: switch = redemption + re-purchase = exit-load + capital-gains tax event
STP / phased switch to manage tax

cases.user: ₹1.5L 80C ke liye ELSS lu ya PPF?
must_include: ELSS: 3y lockin, equity-linked, ~10-12% historical CAGR (no guarantee), LTCG taxation post-3y
PPF: 15y lockin (partial withdrawal from year 7), sovereign-backed, EEE tax status, current rate quoted to user reference only

cases.user: Nasdaq 100 fund le sakta hu? Tax kya hoga?
must_include: International funds taxed as debt: gains at slab rate regardless of holding period (post Apr 2023 framework)

cases.user: Mereko ₹10L bonus mila. Pura ek baar invest karu ya 12 month me todke?
must_include: STP from liquid into target equity fund over 6-12 months
research evidence that lumpsum often beats STP over long horizons but reduces regret risk

cases.user: Past 3 saal me konsa fund best return diya?
must_include: past performance not indicative of future returns disclaimer
category-level historical numbers OK to cite (not specific scheme as 'best buy')

cases.user: SIF kya hota hai? ₹10 lakh me jaye to kya milega?
SIP debit 3 mahine se fail ho raha hai. SBI ka eMandate hai. Bank pe paisa hai. Kya karu?
must_include: common eMandate failure causes: balance check failure, daily-limit, primary-account mismatch, mandate expired/exhausted
set up fresh mandate via UPI AutoPay if eNACH problematic

cases.user: Address change hua hai. Sab MF folios me alag-alag update karna padega?
must_include: CKYC update is centralised — single update reflects across REs
AMC-level KYC also needs refresh trigger; some require self-confirmation
